title: armeria arctica subsp. californica
intro: Armeria arctica subsp. californica, also known as Western arctic armeria, is a subspecies of the Armeria arctica plant, which is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Armeria arctica subsp. californica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to skin conditions and wounds.
